failed_attempts.sql:
WITH healthy_options AS (
  SELECT p.`id` AS profile_id, AVG(m.num_proteins) AS num_proteins_avg
  FROM "publication"
    JOIN publication_collab AS pc ON publication.id = pc.publication_id
    JOIN profile AS p ON pc.profile_id = p.id
    JOIN media_aspect AS ma ON publication.id = ma.publication_id
  WHERE m.`aspect-name` = 'proteins'
  GROUP BY "profile"
),
 healthy_restaurants AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM healthy_options
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT p2.`id` AS profile_id,
           MIN(ot."order-taken") AS min_odour_taking_after_nibbling AS min_order_taken_at
    FROM "publication"
      LEFT JOIN publication_collab AS pc ON publication.id = pc.publication_id
      LEFT JOIN profile AS p2 ON pc.profile_id = p2.id
      LEFT JOIN order_tally AS ot ON publication.id = ot.publication_id
    WHERE p2.id = healthy_options.profile_id AND m."aspect-name" IN ('sugars', 'sodium')
    GROUP BY p2."profile"
  ) AS odour_taken
) SELECT DISTINCT * FROM healthy_restaurants ORDER BY num_proteins_avg DESC LIMIT 10
